input.task: Materialize deterministic task tree for the lesson editor rebuild
scope: Current Quill and Markdown editor code is legacy evidence, not rebuild authority
No legacy data migration is in scope
The rebuilt editor must support formatting, headings, lists, media, CTA, persisted preview, and ETag concurrency
The editor authoring UI must present a single continuous writing surface while mapping deterministically to lesson_document_v1 blocks and nodes

task_tree.description: Reconcile active contract text with the editor rebuild target by replacing Markdown-canonical editor law with lesson_document_v1 law and reclassifying Markdown fixtures as legacy compatibility.
retrieval_queries: markdown canonical lesson content content_markdown course_lesson_editor_contract
AVELI_COURSE_DOMAIN_SPEC content model Markdown token system
task_tree.verification_requirement: No active rebuilt-editor contract path declares Markdown or content_markdown as canonical editor authority.

task_tree.description: Materialize the document substrate and API shape for lesson_document_v1 content without adding a legacy data migration requirement.
retrieval_queries: studio lesson content read ETag If-Match schemas
task_tree.verification_requirement: The backend exposes content_document read/write shape with ETag and If-Match while legacy content_markdown is not new editor authority.

task_tree.description: Replace Markdown round-trip validation with backend-native lesson_document_v1 schema, reference, media, CTA, and canonical JSON validation plus ETag computation from canonical JSON bytes.
task_tree.verification_requirement: New editor content validation has no dependency on Flutter, Markdown round-trip comparison, or markdown_quill output.

task_tree.description: Add the frontend lesson_document_v1 model, canonical serialization, selection operations, inline mark operations, block operations, clear-formatting semantics, and local validation.
retrieval_queries: clear format bold italic underline toolbar
task_tree.verification_requirement: Frontend can represent and serialize every required editor feature without Markdown or Quill Delta as authority.

task_tree.description: Replace the Course Editor authoring surface with a document-model editor UI that preserves required authoring capabilities and removes Quill from the canonical editor path.
task_tree.verification_requirement: The editor UI can edit document content and save content_document without calling serializeEditorDeltaToCanonicalMarkdown.

task_tree.description: Move image, audio, video, document, and magic-link/CTA authoring into first-class lesson_document_v1 operations and validators.
retrieval_queries: lessonMediaId document link media token rewrite
task_tree.verification_requirement: Media and CTA content persist as document nodes and do not depend on Markdown token or incidental link rewriting in the new path.

task_tree.description: Replace Course Editor Preview Mode rendering with persisted lesson_document_v1 rendering and preserve read-only, persisted-only preview authority.
retrieval_queries: Course Editor Preview Mode persisted snapshot markdown lessonMedia
task_tree.verification_requirement: Preview renders saved content_document only and does not render unsaved draft editor state.

task_tree.description: Align learner lesson rendering to the same document renderer used by editor preview while preserving learner access and media read authority.
task_tree.verification_requirement: Learner rendering uses backend-authored document content and governed media without Markdown as render truth.

task_tree.description: Remove or quarantine legacy Markdown and Quill save, validation, preview, and render paths after document replacements exist.
task_tree.verification_requirement: No new editor save, preview, learner render, or backend validation path imports legacy Markdown or Quill authority modules.

task_tree.description: Create the document fixture corpus and tests for all required editor capabilities, persisted preview, media/CTA, and ETag concurrency.
task_tree.verification_requirement: Tests cover bold, italic, underline, clear formatting, headings, bullet lists, ordered lists, image, audio, video, document, CTA, preview persisted-only behavior, and ETag conflicts.

task_tree.description: Add deterministic audit gates that fail if Markdown, Quill Delta, backend Flutter validation, draft preview, or client media URL construction returns as new editor authority.
retrieval_queries: forbidden Markdown Quill Delta Flutter validator draft preview media URL construction
task_tree.verification_requirement: Automated gates fail on forbidden legacy authority patterns in the rebuilt editor path.

task_tree.description: Run the final aggregate editor rebuild gate across contracts, backend, frontend, tests, dependencies, preview, learner rendering, media, CTA, and concurrency.
retrieval_queries: legacy markdown quill validation forbidden patterns
media CTA document renderer learner preview
task_tree.verification_requirement: The editor is fully document-model based, all required features pass, and no forbidden legacy authority remains in the new path.

task_tree.description: Materialize the continuous authoring surface law so the Course Editor feels like one flowing document while preserving deterministic lesson_document_v1 block/node mapping.
retrieval_queries: LessonDocumentEditor Card TextField Formatvisning block containers
lesson_document_v1 authoring surface continuous writing surface
Markdown Quill legacy editor pathways forbidden continuous authoring
task_tree.verification_requirement: The editor presents a single continuous writing surface without visible per-block containers while preserving deterministic lesson_document_v1 content mapping and without reintroducing Markdown, Quill, or legacy pathways.
